title: Tree-sitter parser resilience
description: Investigate and remediate tree-sitter parser memory-access-out-of-bounds crashes. Live testing showed ~17.5% of files (1,640/9,349) crash the parser when scope expands beyond skills-only to agents+commands+specs+plugins. Skills-only scope is clean. Plan: discriminate among three hypotheses (native version, WASM grammar, content-specific syntax) via minimum failing fixtures, then ship a persistent skip-list policy with telemetry so broad-scope scans stay usable while the root cause is pinned down.
